complete_user_guide/features/part_librar.保存到私有库前，请先确认该元件 **编辑框的角度** 与该元件在当前 CAD 文: Before saving to the private library, confirm that the **angle of the component's editing box** matches the component's angle in the current CAD file (you can tell from the direction of the editing box's control handles). The template is reused at this orientation, so a mismatched angle leaves the component facing the wrong way when the template is later applied. For example, when the component is 180° in CAD, the component box should point downward.
